sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Jedna ruka ne može pljeskati».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «One hand cannot clap».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ التَّعَاوُنَ مَعَ الآخَرِينَ ضَرُورِيٌّ.
sentences.translation: To znači da je saradnja s drugima neophodna.
sentences.translationEn: This means that cooperation with others is necessary.

sentences.arabic: حَاوَلَ مَاهِرٌ حَمْلَ الصَّنْدُوقِ الْكَبِيرِ وَحْدَهُ فَلَمْ يَسْتَطِعْ.
sentences.translation: Mahir je pokušao sam nositi veliku kutiju ali nije mogao.
sentences.translationEn: Mahir tried to carry the big box alone but could not.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مُسَاعَدَةَ أَخِيهِ وَحَمَلَا الصَّنْدُوقَ مَعًا بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Zatražio je pomoć brata i zajedno su lako ponijeli kutiju.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his brother for help and they carried the box together easily.
